rulings.Case Title: LUIS HEATH VS. FELL STREET PARTNERS LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 20, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFFs NATHALIE DELRUE-MCGUIRE, GARRY MCGUIRE, LISA PODESTA and ROBERT PODESTA's Of Motion To Compel Documents Responsive To Plaintiff Lisa Podestas Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Nos 1-61, 63-68, And 70-143 To Defendant Park Lane Associates LP And Request For Sanctions Hearing Required. rulings.Case Title: VICENTE SOTO VS. RITU VOHRA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 20, 2015 Line 6. PLAINTIFF VICENTE SOTO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Complaint may be amended to add Rosa Soto. Motion is denied without prejudice as to Evangelina and David Soto. Proposed amendments are insufficient to indicate which of the 20 causes of action are going to be alleed by Evangelina and David and which are not. = (501/SRB)
